title: Enable File Attachments & Activity Templates in Emails & Activities on Mobile App

posts.author: Hernanmelinsky (Hernan Melinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
🚀 Feature Request: Enable File Attachments & Activity Templates in Emails & Activities on Mobile App 📲

📌 Context:

My client relies heavily on Emails & Activities to inform payments using a custom activity named “Inform Payment”. The process requires users to:

  • ✅ Attach a receipt to the activity.
  • ✅ Use a predefined activity template for consistency.

While this works flawlessly on the desktop version, the mobile app does not allow file attachments or activity template usage within Emails & Activities. This is a major challenge for field agents who primarily work from their phones. 📵

🚨 Issue:

  • 🚫 Users can attach files in updates but not in activities.
  • 🚫 Activity templates are missing in the mobile app.

💡 Request:

  • ✅ Enable file attachments in Emails & Activities on mobile.
  • ✅ Ensure activity templates are accessible on mobile, just like on desktop.

This functionality is crucial for teams operating remotely or in the field. 🌍📱

I've attached screenshots illustrating the issue. Looking forward to your feedback! Let's make mobile workflows as seamless as desktop! 🚀

Thanks,
Hernán

E&A deskop version with templates and attachment available539×517 22.9 KB

Mobile Version E&A no way to attach a file.739×1600 37.5 KB

Monday App - Attachment option for Updates739×1600 76 KB
